name: From Paper to Program: Knowledge Externalization and Bottleneck Diagnosis in AI-Assisted Quantum Many-Body Programming

description: arXiv:2604.04089v5 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large language models can write scientific code, but direct paper-to-program translation remains fragile when correctness depends on tacit conventions rather than explicit equations. We frame this as a knowledge-externalization problem: index choices, gauges, fermionic signs, contraction order, validation gates, and scaling constraints m...
